name: NI 43-101 Technical Report for the 3Q Project in Argentina dated April 2019.pdf

document.title: NI 43-101 Technical Report for the 3Q Project in Argentina dated April 2019.pdf
document.description: This document is an NI 43-101 compliant technical report and preliminary feasibility study on the Tres Quebradas (3Q) Project in Catamarca, Argentina, focusing on lithium brine deposits.
